transcription.text: This is the time of year when the flu starts to spread. Before the first sneeze help protect with a spray. Before the first tissue help defend with a wipe and help prevent with Lysol to get ten times more protection and kill 99.9% of germs around the house. This season help protect your family with Lysol. Start helping.
